_comment: Curated kit for Azure architects. Companions are recommended-not-bundled. See docs/install/ for per-client setup. Disable any server by setting disabled=true.

azure-mcp._purpose: Official Microsoft Azure MCP. Source of truth for ARG, Quota, Advisor, Monitor, Policy, RBAC, AKS, AppService.
azure-mcp._disabled_instructions: Set disabled:true to opt out of this server.

microsoft-learn._purpose: Grounded Microsoft Learn doc lookup. Reduces architect hallucination. No self-host needed; uses hosted endpoint.
microsoft-learn._disabled_instructions: Set disabled:true to opt out of this server.

github._purpose: Repo, issue, PR access for IaC reviews and design intent diff. Requires GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN env var.
github._disabled_instructions: Set disabled:true to opt out of this server. Requires GitHub PAT for auth.

mermaid._purpose: Render architecture diagrams inline in design reviews.
mermaid._disabled_instructions: Set disabled:true to opt out of this server.

drawio._purpose: Visio-replacement diagrams, exportable for stakeholder decks.
drawio._disabled_instructions: Set disabled:true to opt out of this server.

kubernetes._purpose: Live cluster inspection during AKS design and ingress migration reviews.
kubernetes._disabled_instructions: Set disabled:true to opt out of this server.

terraform._purpose: HashiCorp Terraform registry lookup, plan, validate.
terraform._disabled_instructions: Set disabled:true to opt out of this server.

mcp-server-azure-architect._purpose: This repo. ALZ checklist queries by ID + scorecard composition. Read-only.
mcp-server-azure-architect._distribution_notes: End users: uvx mcp-server-azure-architect. Dev users: uv run mcp-server-azure-architect. PyPI publication pending v0 release.
